title: Text component — body copy with tones
description: Paragraph and inline-oriented Text primitive with sizes, tones, and emphasis flags for React interfaces.

og.title: Typography · Paragraph · Zentauri UI
og.description: Paragraph and inline-oriented Text primitive with sizes, tones, and emphasis flags for React interfaces.

twitter.title: Typography · Paragraph · Zentauri UI
twitter.description: Paragraph and inline-oriented Text primitive with sizes, tones, and emphasis flags for React interfaces.

intro: Default to paragraph semantics with optional span, div, or label rendering when forms require it.
useCases: Highlighted phrases without leaving the Text primitive.

faqs.question: How do sizes map?
faqs.answer: sm, base, and lg align with Tailwind text-sm through text-lg with relaxed leading.

faqs.question: Can I nest interactive elements?
faqs.answer: Children can include links or buttons; keep interactive targets large enough for pointer and keyboard users.

faqs.question: Does highlight use a fixed color?
faqs.answer: Highlight applies an amber translucent wash suitable for dark shells; override with className if your theme differs.

sections.heading: What it does
sections.body:
Provides sized body copy with tone variants and emphasis switches.

Highlight wraps phrases with a subtle background wash.

sections.heading: Composition and API
sections.body:
Use `as` to swap tags without losing typography recipes.

Pair muted tone with secondary layout chrome sparingly.

sections.heading: Accessibility
sections.body:
Prefer paragraphs for blocks of text.

Reserve label rendering for actual label semantics tied to controls.

sections.heading: Next.js integration notes
sections.body:
Server components can render static Text content.

Move interactive demos into client boundaries only when required.
